representatives.name: Miss Lo Sum-yee Rosa
representatives.role: SPP of the Department of Justice, for HKSAR

representatives.name: Mr Chung Boey
representatives.role: for the 1st accused; instructed by Eli K K Tsui & Co, assigned by DLA

representatives.name: Mr Lau Chung-man Clement
representatives.role: for the 2nd accused; instructed by Raymond C P Lo & Co, assigned by DLA

charges.charge_name: Conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug

offence_date.source: on an unknown date between December 2022 and the 27th day of December 2022

offence_time.source: at about 1.20 am on 27 December 2022, the police arrived at Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong

place_of_offence.address: Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong
place_of_offence.source: Room 606D, Block B, Yau Tong Industrial City in Kwun Tong

cross_border.source: Both defendants were jointly charged with one count of conspiracy to traffic in a dangerous drug, namely ... in a room in Yau Tong

trafficking_mode.source: his role was more like a courier taking the drug from the Lei Yue Mun Plaza back to the room

roles_facts.source: Counsel submitted that his role was more like a courier taking the drug from the Lei Yue Mun Plaza back to the room; he received two transparent resealable plastic bags of cocaine from an unknown male at the 2nd floor and returned to the room

reasons_for_offence.source: he committed the present offence to earn quick money. Because the 1st defendant was indebted so he agreed ... he owed debts in the region of $300,000

benefits_received.source: an acquaintance asked if he was interested in a job ... The acquaintance said that he would be remunerated afterwards

trafficking_mode.source: the 2nd defendant signed a tenancy agreement to rent the room at the monthly rental of $4,800 ... he had rented the room and did not lock it, apparently for the purpose of allowing others to use it whenever they wanted

roles_facts.source: he had rented the room and did not lock it, apparently for the purpose of allowing others to use it whenever they wanted; he was the registered tenant of the room

Call records showed that the 2nd defendant had called the 1st defendant a total of 19 times ... The only reasonable inference is that he made those calls either to give instructions to the 1st defendant or to check his progress
